full_text:
Huangfu Li 皇甫酈
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Huangfu Li (皇甫酈)was born in Anding. Related to Huangfu Song. Tried to make peace between Li Jue and Guo Si for Emperor Xian. Huangfu Li was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
